sections.paragraph:
διορθόω 1 aor. διώρθωσα LXX, mid. διωρθωσάμην. Pass. 1 fut. διορθωθήσομαι LXX; aor. διωρθώθην (s. two next entries; Pind. et al.; ISardGauthier 1, 2, et al.; PPetr III, 53k, 4, et al.; LXX; Jos., Ant. 2, 46 al.) set on the right path ἐπὶ τὸ ἀγαθὸν δ. lead to what is good 1 Cl 21:6.—DELG s.v. ὀρθό.

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

fut. fut. = fut.

Pind Pind , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ISardGauthier ISardGauthier = Nouvelles inscriptions de Sardes II, ed. PGauthier—List 3

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 251
